feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Journal entries item text issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Customer would like to mark the PO number in journal entry item text when doing the PO invoice settlement after downpayment.

In s4hana cloud public edition, can we use below custom logic to write the journal entries' item text? or would it be possible to create substitution rule to achieve the purpose? If not, any workarounds can copy the PO number to the JE item text?

entry.title: How to upload the bulk data in S/4HANA Public Cloud?Such as Sales orders, Production Orders etc
Eventdriven Achitecture using BTPEA instead of CPEA - Do you have ideas?
entry.content:
Hi all,

i need your thoughts/ideas on something. A long time ago (just before they announced BTPEA), we had the wonderful option to use EventMesh for just a few euro's. Perfect for an event driven architecture. Just like SAP wants. Connect Process Automation or integration suite using Webhooks, wonderful!

Suddenly, BTPEA came along. During a partner call it was stated that some features now available in CPEA would be cancelled or put in some "container" in BTPEA. The advantage of BTPEA would be that all services could be consumed (CPEA didn't gave the option to do everything with credits).

During the partnercall we could see in a glimps that Eventmesh would not be available in BTPEA as a separate service, but would be included as a capability in Integration Suite........"but no worries! You can still get eventmesh using a subscription and/or payg to get your cost effective Event Driven Architecture up and running"

Well, a significant amount of months later (Q4-2024), this is the situation:

  • Eventmesh is only available in CPEA (which is officially not sold anymore (but you can still get it if you really want to)
  • BTPEA does not have a separate EventMesh option to activate
  • Eventmesh is only part of the Integration Suite Standard edition
  • Eventmesh is in no way to be bought using subscription and/or Payg (Advanced eventmesh doesn't count, that is more expensive than 1 integration suite tenant).

Considering the growth of Public Cloud customers with a basic need for integration (Base edition), how can we still utilize an event driven architecture? 

Some suggestions:

  1. Just make Eventmesh available again in BTPEA
  2. Make it available as a PayG and/or Subscription option (and make sure we can keep it within on global account)
  3. Make it available in the Base edition of Integration Suite (i can live with that)

Just needed to get this of my chest.

All the best

Laurens

entry.title: Custom RAP Application Deployment to SAP S/4 HANA Public Edition Issue
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I have created a custom rap application in ADT and exposed it to OData V4 and from Business Application studio I have deployed the application to Development Tenant.

Then I created IAM App and Business Catalog and assigned IAM App to business catalog.

Later I created a Custom Business Role and assigned the catalog which I created in ADT by assigning IAM application to it and assigned to Business Users and also in Business Catalogs tile I can see my catalog

But I am unable to see the Custom RAP Application in System..

Kindly Help to achieve.

Thanks in Advance. 

Regards,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to delete a wrong entry from Organizational Unit?
entry.content:
I created a wrong entry in Organization entity. I want to delete it because it is wrong and should not be transported to the Production System.

entry.title: Is it possible to prolong the starter system in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and what does it cost?
entry.content:
Is it possible to prolong the starter system in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and what does it cost?
Thanks very much and best regards,
Niko.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public without tax engine
entry.content:
Regarding the implementation of SAP S4HANA Cloud Public edition, it is known that for Brazilian localization purposes customers must rely on external tax engines for proper taxation, based on each business scenário.  However, more than once the question about the necessity to hire this additional services - tax engine SaaS - came into the conversation table.

In one every specific scenario, a customer with low transaction volume (with high service invoice values), invoicing directly (and manually) in the Sao Paulo's cityhall website, asked if it would be possible to have S4HC Public WITHOUT a tax engine. Their idea is to post manually in FI the receivables after invoicing manually and, from the inbound perspective, to post also manually all the values when processing MIGO_MIRO. In this way, determinations wouldn't be required and, so, the tax engine.

This is a new scenario for me and I would like to receive guidance from the experts. Does anybody have implemented (or at least an opinion about) the possibility of avoiding a Tax Engine contract to operate S4HC Public?

Thanks a lot

André Mascaro

entry.title: Issue with Bulk Requisition Creation and Excel Copy-Paste ( Manage Manual Reservations application )
entry.content:
we need to Manage Manual Reservations through requisitions, but we are encountering the following challenges. 

  • Bulk Requisition Creation: We are unable to create requisitions in bulk for the 650 items that need to be transferred. The system does not seem to support this functionality for our use case.
  • Excel Copy-Paste Issue: Even though we have the data in the correct format in Excel, the system is not allowing us to copy and paste the information into the requisition fields.

entry.title: Multiple table entries Creation in single object page Without Navigation to another page
entry.content:
Hi Community ,

We got a requirement in RAP(ABAP Environment ) which contains header data, multiple purchase order creation table and attachment table.

In Purchase order table , we need to create multiple PO in same screen itself without navigating to next screen/page (screenshots are added ) .We have trying to developing this screen using Managed Scenario. Pls guide us . 

 

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model   SAP S/4HANA Cloud, extended edition 

@peterpersiel

entry.title: Error Importing content in SAP Build Work Zone - SAP Mobile Start with SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I’m setting up SAP Mobile Start with SAP S/4HANA Cloud in SAP Build Work Zone.
Tutorial: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/Setting-Up-SAP-Build-Work-Zone-standard-edition-and-SAP-Mobile-Start-with-SAP-S-4HANA

The problem is that when I import content into SAP Build Work Zone, it doesn’t bring any components.

When I check in SAP S/4HANA Cloud using the “Display Launchpad Content Exposure Logs” app, I see the scenario is called correctly.

Here is how I have the content provider configured:

This is how I have the destinations set up in BTP:
Design-time destination

Runtime tiles

Runtime apps

This is the SAP S/4HANA Cloud role exposed in BTP.

Does anyone have an idea where the error might be or what configuration point I should check?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurment-2411 document
entry.content:
Hi 

As we can see the s/4 hana public cloud release is planned on the November 16 i.e 2411 for Production system, we are not able to fine the release document in the sap help portal, when we are checking it is redirecting to the Older version document i.e 2408  .

entry.title: Transition from Custom CDSView to other apps
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

I create the list in the Custom CDSView app.
I would like to know if it is possible to move to other screens from the list created in the Custom CDSView app.

For example, I created a Service Contract item list in the Custom CDSView app.
I want to move from the Service Contract item list created in the Custom CDSView app to the Service Contract Display.

Is this possible by creating a CDSView?

Soma

entry.content:

We would like to know if it's possible to reimport a Software Collection in QAS system ?



Thanks.

entry.title: Qualification management in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello the community, 

I'm looking for a way to manage the qualifications in S/4HANA Public Cloud but I don't see the equivalent of these ECC6 transactions : OOQA - Change Qualification Catalog / PPPM - Change profile...

Do you know if these transactions are still available in Public Cloud ?  I have seen the App ID F2398A but it is not contained in Public Cloud...

Best Regards,

Gilles

entry.title: Unplanned delivery cost on specific GL account
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Our customer would like to have their delivery costs booked on a specific GL account in order to have a better follow up of these costs. 

I changed the setup from distribute among invoice items to different G/L line:

 

 

This works fine but the GL account requires a cost center to be posted on. 

Would someone know if there is a way to spread the unplanned delivery cost among the cost centers of the invoice items?

I was thinking about a substitution or custom logic as assigning a default cost center to the GL account is not an option for the customer.

Thanks.

Best regards.

Eli

entry.title: Export Configuration CBC
entry.content:
Dear SAP community, 

we are looking for an easy way to copy/export the configuration from CBC to another client. Is there any functionality available which makes it easy to set up other clients?

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: PO Approval Workflow For Changes
entry.content:
As standard, when PO approval WF is turned on, user must go through WF. There is a requirement to trigger PO WF ONLY when certain changes(i.e. price, quantity change) happen on the PO, comparing to the initiating requisition. If there is no change, user just saves PO without triggering redundant WF.We have seen there is no such option in the flexible workflow configuration. Will SAP have a solution to this in any releases?


Another option is to stop user from editing the price/quantity in PO by using field selection but public cloud has a limitation. Need SAP’s advise if any options without going through enhancement.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
